positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical, central composition featuring a whimsical bioluminescent forest scene. The main subject is a group of stylized woodland creatures (e.g., deer, foxes, rabbits) interacting with oversized, glowing flora. The color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and luminous teal, utilizing strong contrast between dark forest silhouettes and bright, glowing neon elements. Use a geometric, line-art inspired aesthetic mixed with ethereal watercolor wash textures. The style should evoke a fusion of Art Nouveau and psychedelic psychedelia, suitable for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, clean lines, dramatic backlighting coming from the flora, perfect for a repeating or single-focus central print. Clean silhouette, symmetrical composition.
negative: photorealistic, low detail, grain, noisy, blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, debris, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts
